function.name: query_kb
function.description: Search the HVAC knowledge base for troubleshooting steps, part numbers, or specs matching a symptom or equipment model.

query.description: Natural-language query, e.g. 'Carrier 58STA short cycling' or 'capacitor replacement procedure'.

equipment_model.description: Optional equipment model to narrow results, e.g. '58STA090'.

function.name: log_finding
function.description: Record a diagnosed issue to the inspection log. Call this once the technician has confirmed a concrete problem.

location.description: Where on the equipment the issue was found, e.g. 'outdoor condenser unit'.

issue.description: Short description of the problem, e.g. 'failed run capacitor'.

severity.description: Severity. Critical = safety risk or unit offline.

part_number.description: Optional replacement part number if known.

function.name: flag_safety
function.description: Raise a safety alert. Stops the normal flow and forces the UI into STOP mode. Use for gas smell, electrical hazard, refrigerant leak, etc.

hazard.description: Short hazard descriptor, e.g. 'suspected natural gas leak'.

immediate_action.description: Exact next action the technician must take.

level.description: Caution = continue with precautions. Stop = cease work, evacuate if needed.

function.name: flag_scope_change
function.description: Notify that the repair scope has expanded beyond the original work order. Used for customer communication and billing.

original_scope.description: What the work order originally called for.

new_scope.description: What needs to be done now.

function.name: close_job
function.description: Finalize the visit. Summarizes findings, parts used, and next steps. Call only when technician confirms the job is done.

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what was done.

parts_used.description: List of part numbers installed or replaced.

follow_up_required.description: Whether a follow-up visit is needed.

follow_up_notes.description: What the follow-up should address, if any.

function.name: search_online_hvac
function.description: Search online HVAC technician forums (r/HVAC, r/hvacadvice, r/Refrigeration) for field reports, community discussion, or uncommon equipment. Call this whenever the user asks to look online, check Reddit, find field reports, or asks about a rare unit not in the KB. Returns titles, snippets, and URLs. Safe to call — this is the tool's normal use.

query.description: Equipment model + symptom, e.g. 'Carrier 58STA short cycling'. Exclude customer names and addresses.
